body:
Hey Marcus, thanks for the note — always good to hear from you. I've been doing a lot of thinking about the [Meridian Grid](companies/meridian-grid) deal since we last connected, and I'm increasingly convinced there's a compelling co-investment opportunity here if the terms land where we expect them to. Given your team's infrastructure thesis, I figured you'd want eyes on this before it gets too crowded at the cap table. The founders have a strong technical background in grid-edge software and the market timing feels right with the IRA incentives still flowing. Would love to jump on a call this week to walk through the deck and compare notes — are you free Thursday or Friday afternoon?

Amara
